For 12 portions:
200ml Jägermeister Orange
660ml orange lemonade
200ml fresh orange juice
200g sugar
a dash of invert sugar
a dash of vanilla extract
lime and orange zest

Instructions:
(1) Bring the Jägermeister Orange to a boil to reduce the alcohol content (otherwise the mixture won’t freeze properly).
(2) Add all remaining ingredients and let simmer for a couple of minutes.
(3) Pour into a sorbet maker and churn until slushy.
(4) Serve one spoonful of sorbet in a glass and top with a splash of (mediterranean) tonic water.
(5) Garnish with mint and a dried orange slice - enjoy!

🍒 DIRTY SHIRLEY BITES 🍒
Yes, you can lift them by the stem. Yes, you need these at your next party.

Makes ~20 cubes (8×8 pan)
—
INGREDIENTS
 • 2 cups clear ginger ale (flattened)
 • 1 cup vodka (plain or vanilla)
 • ½ cup orange liqueur (Cointreau or triple sec)
 • ¾ cup cold water
 • 5 tbsp sugar
 • 3 tbsp grenadine
 • 4½ tbsp + 1 tsp powdered gelatin (≈6½ packets — this is the firmness key)
 • 30–36 maraschino cherries, stem-on, drained & VERY well dried
 • Edible glitter (optional but… ✨)
—
HOW TO MAKE:
1️⃣ Sprinkle gelatin over ¾ cup cold water. Let sit 5 minutes. Don’t stir.
2️⃣ In a saucepan over LOW heat, warm ginger ale + sugar + grenadine until sugar dissolves. Do NOT boil.
3️⃣ Add bloomed gelatin and stir until completely clear.
4️⃣ Let cool slightly, then stir in Cîroc + orange liqueur.
5️⃣ Pour ⅓ into a lightly greased 8×8 pan. Chill 12-15 min until just set.
6️⃣ Add cherries 🍒arrange in a grid and gently nestle into the semi-set layer.
7️⃣ Slowly pour remaining liquid over cherries. Chill for 4-6 hours.
8️⃣ Warm bottom of pan, lift out, and cut with straight downward pressure (no sawing). Wipe knife between cuts.

If cupid drank espresso, it’d look like this🍒☁️ :

INGREDIENTS
 • 1.5 oz Ciroc
 • 1 oz coffee liqueur
 • 1 oz espresso or cold brew concentrate
 • ½ oz cherry liqueur
 • ice

 • ¼ cup heavy cream
 • 2 tbsp milk
 • 1.5 oz cherry syrup
 • a pinch of xanthan gum

STEPS
 1️⃣ Shake martini ingredients with ice until very cold.
 2️⃣ Strain into a chilled coupe, leaving room for foam.
 3️⃣ Froth cream, milk, syrup + xanthan until thick.
 4️⃣ Spoon a generous cloud of foam on top.
 5️⃣ Top with valentines sprinkles and enjoy!
